scripts.build:site: npm run export:content && npm run build:page-content && npm run build
scripts.check:site:app: BOOK_INTERNAL_LINK_MODE=html PUBLIC_INTERNAL_LINK_MODE=html npm run build:site && python3 ../scripts/check_capacitor_internal_links.py
scripts.build:android:debug: npm run build:site && npm run sync:android && cd android && ./gradlew assembleDebug
